steps.title: Use the quotation goal
steps.content: The student wants to explain Brook Farm's goal using a quotation from Samuel Whitman. The sentence must name Brook Farm and use Whitman's words to state the purpose of the community.

steps.title: Reject missing context
steps.content: Choice A quotes only a fragment and does not name Brook Farm. Choice B gives background about utopias but includes no quotation. Choice C gives location and historical context but does not use Whitman's words or explain the goal. The remaining choice identifies Brook Farm and uses the quoted purpose from Whitman. The answer is D.
